title: evolvulus pterocaulon
intro: Evolvulus pterocaulon, also known as blue dungweed, is a flowering plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus pterocaulon include treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair. Evolvulus pterocaulon can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat a range of ailments.
